text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the academy with Meisho
Doto when we hear King Halo's voice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes! If you want a first-rate racer, then look no
further than...

text_block_list.name: Entourage
text_block_list.text: King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh wow... So that's the King Commendation...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
K-King carries herself so highly... She's really
radiant...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good day, Doto. And thank you for that intense
gaze.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeek?! I'm s-s-sorry! I didn't mean to stare!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry. Your intentions are
loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You wish to recite the King Commendation with
us! Do you not?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh! W-wait, m-me?! I don't think I can. I-I'm
sure I'll mess up...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Don't worry that head of yours! I'm
granting you the right to learn directly from me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're willing to teach... someone like... me?!
Huuuh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo begins her lesson amid Meisho Doto's
confusion.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's my name?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ki... King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The correct answer is "King"! It's important to
keep your pronunciation curt and crisp.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ki... Kin... Kin-guh!

text_block_list.name: Almond-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
So close! It should actually sound like "King"! Try
to say it clearly, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh, my apologies! I j-just can't seem to get it
right!
choice_data_list: I suppose you do struggle with enunciating...
I suppose you do struggle with enunciating...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Then consider this your chance to overcome your
nerves! Now, try and repeat my name until you
get it right!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but, I s-surely shouldn't waste any more of your
time, King!

text_block_list.name: Short-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's fine. The three of us don't have anywhere
to be, so take your time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I c-couldn't possibly do that! Um, I will practice
on my own once I get home! A-a-apologies for all
this!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Practice on your own? You...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well, no, what I meant was... I'm sorry, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to nail it in one go... If I do, maybe I'll
become a little confident, just like you are,
King... Ohh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I like that you possess zeal. We will recite
the King Commendation until you succeed!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wha... r-really?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: King... well, um... I pwomise to do my b-b-best!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-o-okay! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I shall have you practice with the other two!
Perhaps their contributions will ease you into
proper enunciation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: G-got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto continues with her training well into
the afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll go buy us all d-drinks, okay?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... I'm really s-sorry, but I don't have my
wallet on me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Your carelessness is quite pronounced... No
matter, I suppose this calls for thorough
guidance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's strict teachings resume after we take
time out to relax and recover.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: K!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: K stands for kindling—a kindling fire of hope!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I!

text_block_list.name: Entourage
text_block_list.text: I stands for incredible—incredibly first-rate! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: N!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N stands for noble—who nobly brandishes her
talent!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: G!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: G stands for great! Because King Halo is great!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I applaud your quickness in mastering
my new King Commendation!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, no... not at all... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through practice, Meisho Doto succeeds in
performing the new King Commendation.
